# knowledge-tensions

The analysis identifies 10 core knowledge tensions across 88 sources—each representing pairs of seemingly contradictory principles that coexist depending on observation layer and scale. The key meta-insight is structural: these aren't true contradictions but layer-dependent effects where the same phenomenon enables at one level and constrains at another. ISC should evolve into a "layer-aware" version that models how optimizing at one structural level can degrade another.
